title: Trouble Makers
writer: Gerald Schnitzer, Edmond Seward, Tim Ryan
actors: Leo Gorcey, Huntz Hall, Gabriel Dell
plot: Slip and Sach are in the sidewalk star-gazing business when they see a murder committed in a room at the El Royale Hotel, blocks away. In spite of the fussy-and-fidget objections of the hotel manager, Andre Schmidtlapp, the Bowery...
